description_long: This is a brightly colored plastic water gun featuring a large, cylindrical green water reservoir mounted horizontally along the top of the body, secured with orange bands. The main body is tan with a molded handle and trigger area, and the front section has two blue barrels with orange tips, suggesting a dual-stream design. The water reservoir is prominent and likely holds a significant volume, with a rounded end and a visible fill cap. The trigger is located beneath the reservoir, integrated into the handle, and is colored blue for contrast. The overall design is playful and ergonomic, with smooth, rounded edges and a combination of bold colors for visual appeal. The surface appears glossy and hard, typical of injection-molded plastic toys.
description: A large, colorful plastic water gun with a green cylindrical reservoir, tan body, and dual blue barrels with orange accents. The design is playful, ergonomic, and visually striking.
description_view_0: The left side view highlights the large green reservoir, tan handle, and blue trigger, with both blue barrels and orange tips clearly visible.
description_view_1: The rear-left view emphasizes the rounded end of the green reservoir and the tan body, with the blue barrels extending forward and the orange bands securing the reservoir.
description_view_2: The right side view shows the dual blue barrels and orange tips most prominently, with the green reservoir and tan handle visible beneath.
description_view_3: The rear-right view displays the back of the tan body, the green reservoir, and the blue barrels extending away, with orange bands and fill cap visible.
attribute_trigger_design: The trigger is a standard pull type, colored blue, and integrated into the handle area. It is slightly curved for ergonomic use and appears smooth without visible texturing.
attribute_nozzle_type: The nozzle consists of two small, round blue barrels with orange tips, each with a single opening, designed for dual water streams.
attribute_water_reservoir_style: The water reservoir is a large, horizontally mounted green cylinder with rounded ends, secured by orange bands. It is integrated into the body and features a visible fill cap.
attribute_grip_pattern: The grip area is molded into the tan plastic body with subtle ridges and contours for ergonomic handling, but lacks additional texturing or rubberized sections.
